name: agentic-board
description: GitOps for BI with AI agents — cross-account GitHub Projects & issues governance, plus future BI GitOps modules.

plugins.name: agentic-board
plugins.description: Cross-account GitHub Projects & issues governance plus a skills-ops lifecycle module: gh-account, projects-admin, abios-feedback, skills-organize, skills-audit, skills-bootstrap, /board, /scan, /skills.

plugins.name: agentic-bi-ops
plugins.description: DEPRECATED alias — renamed to agentic-board. Points to the same plugin so existing `agentic-bi-ops` installs keep updating. Install the new name: agentic-board.
